items.name: JUMPSUITE OVERALL PBR COMMUNITY
items.description:
Perkumpulan Bocil Roblox Official Outfit

Outfit resmi komunitas PBR (Perkumpulan Bocil Roblox).
Dirancang sebagai jumpsuit komunitas supaya seluruh member tampil seragam, solid, dan beda saat event, party, atau foto bareng.

Mengusung gaya modern–skena Roblox, dengan kombinasi warna khas PBR dan detail simpel tapi standout.
Nyaman dipakai di berbagai avatar (R6 & R15) dan cocok untuk daily outfit komunitas.

Wajib dipakai saat event resmi PBR.

items.name: Medieval Belt Accessory - Red Crossbow Hook
items.description: A hook to span the crossbow easier attached to the belt. When utilized the crossbowman must first attach the crossbow's string to the hook and then place his foot into the stirrup. The crossbow is then pulled down and the string is thereby moved into the crossbow nut's inlet.
